body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-47102", "cvss": {"score": 8.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 8.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:H/VI:H/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-863", "name": "Incorrect Authorization"}], "description": "LiteLLM prior to 1.83.10 allows a user to modify their own user_role via the /user/update endpoint. While the endpoint correctly restricts users to updating only their own account, it does not restrict which fields may be changed. A user who can reach this endpoint can set their role to proxy_admin, gaining full administrative access to LiteLLM including all users, teams, keys, models, and prompt history. Users with the org_admin role have legitimate access to this endpoint and can exploit this vulnerability without chaining any additional flaw.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00653, "percentile": 0.46621}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-wpfp-gwwc-vwq6", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-23T22:48:10Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-wpfp-gwwc-vwq6", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-wpfp-gwwc-vwq6"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-47102"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-21T21:16:32Z", "published_at": "2026-05-21T21:30:37Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-47102", "https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/25541", "https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/commit/128d32d2494b759c5d15da3452452af4c6a34c01", "https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/commit/e6f18ce75b111c9b93dc15c72894cbdeb53177ce", "https://gist.github.com/13ph03nix/9ec616e1fdc77b3673509c60206e827f", "https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/releases/tag/v1.83.10-stable", "https://huntr.com/bounties/8e75edfb-ff05-4e63-bfca-2d93d03fb3b9", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/litellm-privilege-escalation-via-user-update", "https://www.obsidiansecurity.com/blog/litellm-privilege-escalation-rce", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-wpfp-gwwc-vwq6"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm", "summary": "LiteLLM allows a user to modify their own user_role via the /user/update endpoint", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-23T22:48:11Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-wpfp-gwwc-vwq6", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.83.10", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "litellm"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.83.10"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
